Style · CSS

1
/* ============================================================
2
PyViz — Berry Blue + Pastel Yellow Professional Theme
3
Font: Montserrat (headings) + DM Sans (body) + JetBrains Mono (code)
4
============================================================ */
5
 
6
:root {
7
--berry: #1B3A6B;
8
--berry-mid: #2A5298;
9
--berry-light: #3E6FCC;
10
--berry-pale: #E8F0FB;
11
--berry-ultra: #F0F4FD;
12
 
13
--yellow: #F5E86B;
14
--yellow-warm: #F0D94A;
15
--yellow-pale: #FEFBE6;
16
--yellow-dark: #8B7E00;
17
 
18
--ink: #0D1B2A;
19
--ink-mid: #2C3E50;
20
--ink-muted: #5A6B7D;
21
--ink-faint: #A0AEBB;
22
 
23
--surface: #FFFFFF;
24
--surface-alt: #F7F9FC;
25
--surface-raised: #FFFFFF;
26
--border: rgba(27, 58, 107, 0.12);
27
--border-strong: rgba(27, 58, 107, 0.25);
28
 
29
--success: #1A8A4A;
30
--danger: #CC2B2B;
31
--warning: #D97706;
32
 
33
--radius-sm: 6px;
34
--radius-md: 10px;
35
--radius-lg: 16px;
36
--radius-xl: 22px;
37
 
38
--shadow-sm: 0 1px 4px rgba(27,58,107,0.08);
39
--shadow-md: 0 4px 16px rgba(27,58,107,0.10);
40
--shadow-lg: 0 8px 32px rgba(27,58,107,0.14);
41
 
42
--font-display: 'Montserrat', sans-serif;
43
--font-body: 'DM Sans', sans-serif;
44
--font-mono: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace;
45
 
46
--nav-h: 60px;
47
--hero-h: 180px;
48
}
49
 
50
*, *::before, *::after { box-sizing: border-box; margin: 0; padding: 0; }
51
 
52
html { scroll-behavior: smooth; }
53
 
54
body {
55
font-family: var(--font-body);
56
background: var(--surface-alt);
57
color: var(--ink);
58
min-height: 100vh;
59
line-height: 1.6;
60
-webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased;
61
}
62
 
63
/* ===== NAVBAR ===== */
64
.navbar {
65
position: sticky;
66
top: 0;
67
z-index: 100;
68
height: var(--nav-h);
69
background: var(--berry);
70
display: flex;
71
align-items: center;
72
padding: 0 2rem;
73
gap: 2rem;
74
border-bottom: 2px solid var(--yellow);
75
box-shadow: 0 2px 16px rgba(27,58,107,0.25);
76
}
77
 
78
.nav-brand {
79
display: flex;
80
align-items: center;
81
gap: 10px;
82
text-decoration: none;
83
flex-shrink: 0;
84
}
85
 
86
.nav-title {
87
font-family: var(--font-display);
88
font-size: 1.45rem;
89
font-weight: 900;
90
color: var(--yellow);
91
letter-spacing: -0.03em;
92
}
93
 
94
.nav-badge {
95
background: rgba(245,232,107,0.15);
96
color: var(--yellow);
97
font-size: 0.62rem;
98
font-weight: 700;
99
letter-spacing: 0.12em;
100
text-transform: uppercase;
101
padding: 3px 8px;
102
border-radius: 4px;
103
border: 1px solid rgba(245,232,107,0.3);
104
}
105
 
106
.nav-links {
107
display: flex;
108
align-items: center;
109
gap: 0.25rem;
110
margin-left: auto;
111
}
112
 
113
.nav-link {
114
color: rgba(255,255,255,0.7);
115
text-decoration: none;
116
font-size: 0.88rem;
117
font-weight: 500;
118
padding: 6px 14px;
119
border-radius: var(--radius-sm);
120
transition: all 0.18s ease;
121
}
122
 
123
.nav-link:hover,
124
.nav-link.active {
125
background: rgba(245,232,107,0.12);
126
color: var(--yellow);
127
}
128
 
129
.nav-actions {
130
display: flex;
131
gap: 0.5rem;
132
}
133
 
134
.btn-outline {
135
background: transparent;
136
border: 1.5px solid rgba(245,232,107,0.45);
137
color: var(--yellow);
138
font-family: var(--font-body);
139
font-size: 0.84rem;
140
font-weight: 600;
141
padding: 6px 16px;
142
border-radius: var(--radius-sm);
143
cursor: pointer;
144
transition: all 0.18s ease;
145
}
146
 
147
.btn-outline:hover {
148
background: rgba(245,232,107,0.12);
149
border-color: var(--yellow);
150
}
151
 
152
/* ===== HERO STRIP ===== */
153
.hero-strip {
154
background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--berry) 0%, var(--berry-mid) 60%, #1E4080 100%);
155
padding: 3rem 2rem 2.5rem;
156
display: flex;
157
align-items: center;
158
justify-content: space-between;
159
gap: 2rem;
160
border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(245,232,107,0.25);
161
position: relative;
162
overflow: hidden;
163
}
164
 
165
.hero-strip::before {
166
content: '';
167
position: absolute;
168
top: -60px; right: -60px;
169
width: 280px; height: 280px;
170
background: radial-gradient(circle, rgba(245,232,107,0.07) 0%, transparent 70%);
171
border-radius: 50%;
172
}
173
 
174
.hero-strip::after {
175
content: '';
176
position: absolute;
177
bottom: -40px; left: 20%;
178
width: 180px; height: 180px;
179
background: radial-gradient(circle, rgba(245,232,107,0.04) 0%, transparent 70%);
180
border-radius: 50%;
181
}
182
 
183
.hero-eyebrow {
184
display: inline-block;
185
font-size: 0.8rem;
186
font-weight: 600;
187
letter-spacing: 0.1em;
188
text-transform: uppercase;
189
color: var(--yellow);
190
margin-bottom: 0.6rem;
191
opacity: 0.9;
192
}
193
 
194
.hero-heading {
195
font-family: var(--font-display);
196
font-size: 2.2rem;
197
font-weight: 800;
198
color: #fff;
199
line-height: 1.15;
200
letter-spacing: -0.03em;
201
margin-bottom: 0.8rem;
202
position: relative;
203
z-index: 1;
204
}
205
 
206
.hero-heading em {
207
font-style: normal;
208
color: var(--yellow);
209
}
210
 
211
.hero-sub {
212
font-size: 0.97rem;
213
color: rgba(255,255,255,0.7);
214
max-width: 480px;
215
line-height: 1.65;
216
position: relative;
217
z-index: 1;
218
}
219
 
220
.hero-chips {
221
display: flex;
222
flex-direction: column;
223
gap: 0.5rem;
224
flex-shrink: 0;
225
position: relative;
226
z-index: 1;
227
}
228
 
229
.chip {
230
display: flex;
231
align-items: center;
232
gap: 8px;
233
font-size: 0.82rem;
234
font-weight: 600;
235
padding: 7px 14px;
236
border-radius: 30px;

239
.chip-blue {
240
background: rgba(255,255,255,0.1);
241
color: rgba(255,255,255,0.9);
242
border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.2);

244
 
245
.chip-yellow {
246
background: rgba(245,232,107,0.15);

.chip-dot {
252

253

255
opacity: 0.8;

259
/* ===== EXAMPLES BAR ===== */
260
.examples-bar {
261
background: var(--surface);
262
border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
263
padding: 0.75rem 2rem;
264
display: flex;
265
align-items: center;
266
gap: 1rem;
267
flex-wrap: wrap;
268
}
269
 
270
.examples-label {
271
font-size: 0.82rem;
272
font-weight: 600;
273
color: var(--ink-muted);
274
white-space: nowrap;
275
text-transform: uppercase;
276
letter-spacing: 0.07em;
277
}
278
 
279
.example-pills {
280
display: flex;
281
gap: 0.5rem;
282
flex-wrap: wrap;
283
}
284
 
285
.pill {
286
background: var(--berry-ultra);
287
border: 1.5px solid var(--border);
288
color: var(--berry-mid);
289
font-family: var(--font-body);
290
font-size: 0.82rem;
291
font-weight: 600;
292
padding: 5px 14px;
293
border-radius: 20px;
294
cursor: pointer;
295
transition: all 0.16s ease;
296
}
297
 
298
.pill:hover {
299
background: var(--berry);
300
border-color: var(--berry);
301
color: var(--yellow);
302
transform: translateY(-1px);
303
box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(27,58,107,0.18);
304
}
305
 
306
.pill.active {
307
background: var(--berry);
308
border-color: var(--berry);
309
color: var(--yellow);
310
}
311
 
312
/* ===== WORKSPACE ===== */
313
.workspace {
314
display: grid;
315
grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
316
gap: 0;
317
min-height: calc(100vh - var(--nav-h) - var(--hero-h) - 48px);
318
border-top: 1px solid var(--border);
319
}
320
 
321
/* ===== PANELS ===== */
322
.panel {
323
background: var(--surface);
324
display: flex;
325
flex-direction: column;
326
min-height: 640px;
327
}
328
 
329
.panel-editor {
330
border-right: 2px solid var(--border-strong);
331
}
332
 
333
.panel-header {
334
display: flex;
335
align-items: center;
336
justify-content: space-between;
337
padding: 0.75rem 1.25rem;
338
background: var(--berry);
339
border-bottom: 2px solid var(--yellow);
340
}
341
 
342
.panel-title {
343
display: flex;
344
align-items: center;
345
gap: 8px;
346
font-family: var(--font-display);
347
font-size: 0.88rem;
348
font-weight: 700;
349
color: #fff;
350
letter-spacing: 0.04em;
351
text-transform: uppercase;

354
.panel-icon {
355

358
 
359
.panel-actions {
360
display: flex;
361
gap: 6px;
362

363
 
364
.icon-btn {
365
background: rgba(255,255,255,0.1);
366
border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.2);
367
color: rgba(255,255,255,0.75);
368
width: 28px; height: 28px;
369

370
cursor: pointer;
371
font-size: 0.82rem;
372
display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
373
transition: all 0.16s;
374
}
375
 
376
.icon-btn:hover {
377
background: rgba(245,232,107,0.2);
378
color: var(--yellow);
379
border-color: rgba(245,232,107,0.4);

/* ===== CODE EDITOR ===== */
383
.editor-wrap {
384
display: flex;
385
flex: 1;
386
overflow: auto;
387
background: #0D1B2A;
388
}
389
 
390
.line-numbers {
391
padding: 1rem 0.75rem;
392
font-family: var(--font-mono);
393
font-size: 0.8rem;
394
line-height: 1.7;
395
color: rgba(255,255,255,0.2);
396
text-align: right;
397
background: #0D1B2A;
398
border-right: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.06);
399
min-width: 42px;
400
flex-shrink: 0;
401
user-select: none;
402
}
403
 
404
.code-editor {
405
flex: 1;
406
padding: 1rem;
407
background: #0D1B2A;
408
color: #E8F0FB;
409
font-family: var(--font-mono);
410
font-size: 0.88rem;
411
line-height: 1.7;
412
border: none;
413
outline: none;
414
resize: none;
415
tab-size: 4;
416
white-space: pre;
417
overflow-x: auto;
418
}
419
 
420
.code-editor::placeholder {
421
color: rgba(255,255,255,0.2);
422
}
423
 
424
.editor-footer {
425

427

.btn-run {

gap: 8px;

background: var(--yellow);

.playback-bar {

.ctrl-btn {

font-family: var(--font-mono);
671
font-size: 0.8rem;
672
white-space: pre-wrap;
673
color: var(--ink-mid);
674
}
675
 
676
/* ===== CALL STACK ===== */
677
.stack-frame {
678
background: var(--berry-pale);
679
border: 1.5px solid var(--border-strong);
680
border-radius: var(--radius-sm);
681
padding: 6px 10px;
682
margin-bottom: 5px;
683
font-family: var(--font-mono);
684
font-size: 0.78rem;
685
color: var(--berry);
686
display: flex;
687
align-items: center;
688
gap: 6px;
689
transition: all 0.2s;
690
animation: slideIn 0.18s ease;
691
}
692
 
693
.stack-frame.top-frame {
694
background: var(--berry);
695
color: var(--yellow);
696
border-color: var(--berry-mid);
697
}
698
 
699
.stack-frame-arrow {
700
font-size: 0.7rem;
701
opacity: 0.5;
702
}
703
 
704
@keyframes slideIn {
705
from { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(-4px); }
706
to { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); }
707
}
708
 
709
/* ===== VARIABLES ===== */
710
.var-row {
711
display: flex;
712
align-items: flex-start;
713
gap: 6px;
714
padding: 5px 0;
715
border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
716
animation: fadeIn 0.18s ease;
717
}
718
 
719
.var-row:last-child { border-bottom: none; }
720
 
721
.var-name {
722
font-family: var(--font-mono);
723
font-size: 0.78rem;
724
font-weight: 600;
725
color: var(--berry-mid);
726
min-width: 70px;
727
flex-shrink: 0;
728
}
729
 
730
.var-val {
731
font-family: var(--font-mono);
732
font-size: 0.78rem;
733
color: var(--ink);
734
word-break: break-all;
735
flex: 1;
736
}
737
 
738
.var-type {
739
font-size: 0.65rem;
740
font-weight: 600;
741
padding: 2px 5px;
742
border-radius: 4px;
743
background: var(--yellow-pale);
744
color: var(--yellow-dark);
745
border: 1px solid rgba(245,232,107,0.4);
746
flex-shrink: 0;
747
text-transform: lowercase;
748
font-family: var(--font-mono);
749
}
750
 
751
.var-changed {
752
background: rgba(245,232,107,0.15);
753
border-radius: 4px;
754
padding: 3px 4px;
755
margin: -3px -4px;
756
}
757
 
758
@keyframes fadeIn {
759
from { opacity: 0; }
760
to { opacity: 1; }
761
}
762
 
763
/* ===== CODE MIRROR ===== */
764
.code-mirror-wrap {
765
flex: 1;
766
display: flex;
767
flex-direction: column;
768
min-height: 200px;
769
background: var(--surface);
770
}
771
 
772
.code-mirror-header {
773
display: flex;
774
justify-content: space-between;
775
align-items: center;
776
padding: 0.5rem 1.25rem;
777
background: var(--berry-ultra);
778
border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
779
}
780
 
781
.code-mirror-title {
782
font-family: var(--font-display);
783
font-size: 0.72rem;
784
font-weight: 800;
785
text-transform: uppercase;
786
letter-spacing: 0.1em;
787
color: var(--berry);
788
}
789
 
790
.code-mirror-line {
791
font-family: var(--font-mono);
792
font-size: 0.75rem;
793
color: var(--berry-light);
794
font-weight: 600;
795
}
796
 
797
.code-mirror {
798
flex: 1;
799
overflow-y: auto;
800
background: #0D1B2A;
801
padding: 0.75rem 0;
802
}
803
 
804
.mirror-line {
805
display: flex;
806
padding: 1px 0;
807
align-items: stretch;
808
}
809
 
810
.mirror-line-num {
811
width: 42px;
812
text-align: right;
813
padding: 0 10px 0 0;
814
font-family: var(--font-mono);
815
font-size: 0.75rem;
816
color: rgba(255,255,255,0.2);
817
flex-shrink: 0;
818
user-select: none;
819
line-height: 1.7;
820
}
821
 
822
.mirror-line-code {
823
font-family: var(--font-mono);
824
font-size: 0.82rem;
825
color: #C9D9F0;
826
white-space: pre;
827
line-height: 1.7;
828
flex: 1;
829
padding: 0 1rem;
830
}
831
 
832
.mirror-line.active .mirror-line-num {
833
color: var(--yellow);
834
}
835
 
836
.mirror-line.active .mirror-line-code {
837
background: rgba(245,232,107,0.12);
838
border-left: 3px solid var(--yellow);
839
padding-left: calc(1rem - 3px);
840
color: #fff;
841
}
842
 
843
/* ===== EMPTY STATE ===== */
844
.empty-state {
845
color: var(--ink-faint);
846
font-size: 0.8rem;
847
text-align: center;
848
padding: 1.5rem 0.5rem;
849
font-style: italic;
850
}
851
 
852
/* ===== ERROR STATE ===== */
853
.error-state {
854
background: #FFF1F1;
855
border: 1px solid #F5C2C2;
856
border-radius: var(--radius-sm);
857
padding: 8px 12px;
858
color: var(--danger);
859
font-family: var(--font-mono);
860
font-size: 0.78rem;
861
line-height: 1.5;
862
white-space: pre-wrap;
863
}
864
 
865
/* ===== ABOUT SECTION ===== */
866
.about-section {
867
background: var(--surface);
868
border-top: 2px solid var(--border);
869
padding: 4rem 2rem;
870
}
871
 
872
.about-inner {
873
max-width: 1100px;
874
margin: 0 auto;
875
display: grid;
876
grid-template-columns: 1fr 2fr;
877
gap: 4rem;
878
align-items: start;
879
}
880
 
881
.about-eyebrow {
882
display: inline-block;
883
font-size: 0.75rem;
884
font-weight: 700;
885
letter-spacing: 0.12em;
886
text-transform: uppercase;
887
color: var(--berry-light);
888
margin-bottom: 0.75rem;
889
}
890
 
891
.about-heading {
892
font-family: var(--font-display);
893
font-size: 1.8rem;
894
font-weight: 800;
895
color: var(--berry);
896
line-height: 1.2;
897
letter-spacing: -0.02em;
898
margin-bottom: 1rem;
899
}
900
 
901
.about-heading em {
902
font-style: normal;
903
color: var(--yellow-dark);
904
}
905
 
906
.about-body {
907
font-size: 0.95rem;
908
color: var(--ink-muted);
909
line-height: 1.7;
910
}
911
 
912
.about-cards {
913
display: grid;
914
grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr 1fr;
915
gap: 1rem;
916
}
917
 
918
.about-card {
919
background: var(--berry-ultra);
920
border: 1.5px solid var(--border);
921
border-radius: var(--radius-lg);
922
padding: 1.5rem;
923
transition: all 0.2s;
924
}
925
 
926
.about-card:hover {
927
border-color: var(--berry-light);
928
transform: translateY(-2px);
929
box-shadow: var(--shadow-md);
930
}
931
 
932
.about-card-icon {
933
font-size: 1.8rem;
934
margin-bottom: 0.75rem;
935
}
936
 
937
.about-card h3 {
938
font-family: var(--font-display);
939
font-size: 0.9rem;
940
font-weight: 800;
941
color: var(--berry);
942
margin-bottom: 0.4rem;
943
}
944
 
945
.about-card p {
946
font-size: 0.83rem;
947
color: var(--ink-muted);
948
line-height: 1.6;
949
}
950
 
951
/* ===== FOOTER ===== */
952
.footer {
953
background: var(--berry);
954
border-top: 2px solid var(--yellow);
955
padding: 1.5rem 2rem;
956
display: flex;
957
flex-direction: column;
958
align-items: center;
959
gap: 0.4rem;
960
}
961
 
962
.footer-brand {
963
display: flex;
964
align-items: center;
965
gap: 0.5rem;
966
}
967
 
968
.footer-logo {
969
font-family: var(--font-display);
970
font-size: 1.1rem;
971
font-weight: 900;
972
color: var(--yellow);
973
letter-spacing: -0.02em;
974
}
975
 
976
.footer-tagline {
977
font-size: 0.78rem;
978
color: rgba(255,255,255,0.45);
979
}
980
 
981
.footer-copy {
982
font-size: 0.75rem;
983
color: rgba(255,255,255,0.35);
984
}
985
 
986
/* ===== LOADING OVERLAY ===== */
987
.loading-overlay {
988
position: fixed;
989
inset: 0;
990
background: rgba(13,27,42,0.6);
991
display: flex;
992
align-items: center;
993
justify-content: center;
994
z-index: 999;
995
opacity: 0;
996
pointer-events: none;
997
transition: opacity 0.2s;
998
}
999
 
1000
.loading-overlay.active {
1001
opacity: 1;
1002
pointer-events: all;
1003
}
1004
 
1005
.loader-card {
1006
background: var(--surface);
1007
border: 2px solid var(--yellow);
1008
border-radius: var(--radius-lg);
1009
padding: 2rem 3rem;
1010
display: flex;
1011
flex-direction: column;
1012
align-items: center;
1013
gap: 1rem;
1014
box-shadow: var(--shadow-lg);
1015
}
1016
 
1017
.loader-card p {
1018
font-family: var(--font-display);
1019
font-size: 0.9rem;
1020
font-weight: 700;
1021
color: var(--berry);
1022
}
1023
 
1024
.spinner {
1025
width: 36px; height: 36px;
1026
border: 3px solid var(--berry-pale);
1027
border-top-color: var(--berry);
1028
border-radius: 50%;
1029
animation: spin 0.7s linear infinite;
1030
}
1031
 
1032
@keyframes spin {
1033
to { transform: rotate(360deg); }
1034
}
1035
 
1036
/* ===== SCROLLBARS ===== */
1037
::-webkit-scrollbar { width: 6px; height: 6px; }
1038
::-webkit-scrollbar-track { background: transparent; }
1039
::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb { background: rgba(27,58,107,0.2); border-radius: 3px; }
1040
::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb:hover { background: rgba(27,58,107,0.4); }
1041
 
1042
/* ===== RESPONSIVE ===== */
1043
@media (max-width: 900px) {
1044
.workspace { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
1045
.panel-editor { border-right: none; border-bottom: 2px solid var(--border-strong); min-height: 340px; }
1046
.about-inner { grid-template-columns: 1fr; gap: 2rem; }
1047
.about-cards { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
1048
.hero-strip { flex-direction: column; }
1049
.hero-chips { flex-direction: row; flex-wrap: wrap; }
1050
.viz-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
1051
.viz-card { border-right: none; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border); }
1052
}
1053
